# Al Hassa Area

**Summary**: A significant oasis and aquifer system in eastern Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] focused on the Al-Hassa area to investigate subsurface heterogeneity.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] structurally complex area

## Formations Present

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] hofuf-formation, dam-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The area is characterized by a complex interplay between structural features and hydrogeology. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 1]])
